Home / Services / Commercial Security Grilles

Commercial Security Grilles

Detroit-tough security solutions for businesses.

We fabricate commercial security grilles that withstand both forced entry attempts and Michigan's corrosive winters. Unlike off-the-shelf products, our grilles are custom-engineered for each building's vulnerabilities.

For Midtown storefronts, we use 1/2" steel bars with internal rebar cores - a design that stopped a 2019 smash-and-grab attempt cold. All welds are ground smooth to eliminate climbing footholds. Downtown clients get our tamper-proof hinge system with concealed weld points that defeated angle grinder attacks in field tests.

We go beyond basic security by incorporating weather protection. Grilles receive electrostatic powder coating followed by automotive-grade clear coat to resist salt damage. Our sliding track systems include heated elements to prevent winter freeze-ups - a feature developed specifically for Detroit's climate.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Security vulnerability assessment
  2. 02 Step 2: Custom CAD engineering
  3. 03 Step 3: On-site track system fabrication
  4. 04 Step 4: Anti-corrosion treatment

Benefits

  • Insurance premium discounts available
  • Maintains visibility while providing security
  • Withstands -20°F to 110°F
  • Deters without creating fortress appearance

Frequently Asked Questions

How do your grilles compare to national brands?

We build 30% heavier than typical retail grilles using thicker gauge steel. Our local fabrication means no weak points from shipping damage.

Can grilles match my building's architecture?

Absolutely. We've created Art Deco patterns for Midtown businesses and industrial-chic designs for Corktown restaurants.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with commercial security grilles? Contact us today.
